hero.sub: Cold beer, hearty counter meals, hot pizza and a drive-through bottle shop — out on the road between Ballan and Ballarat.

whatsOn.intro: There's always a reason to drop in. Here's what's on at the Gordon.

menuMeta.intro: Big servings, fair prices, nothing fancy — just good pub food made the way it should be.
menuMeta.note: GF = gluten free · V = vegetarian · Tap any dish with a photo to see it · Prices may change — call (03) 5368 9203 to confirm or for daily specials.

happyHourLine: $6 pots of tap beer · Mon–Fri 4–6pm · Sat–Sun 3–5pm

promos.title: Parma Night
promos.body: Six cracking parmas — Mexican, Meatlovers, Tropical, Hot As, Mick's Special & Vegan — all $25, with a free pot of Gordon draught for every meal.

promos.title: Pot & Parma
promos.body: A classic pub favourite for an unbeatable price — a parma and a pot, sorted.

promos.title: Happy Hour
promos.body: $6 pots of tap beer, every single day. Knock off, pull up a stool, and settle in.

promos.title: Seniors Lunch
promos.body: A proper hot lunch at a fair price for our seniors. Available every lunch service, Wednesday to Sunday.

promos.title: Kids Eat Free
promos.body: One free kids meal with every adult main purchased. School holidays only — kitchen's closed Mondays & Tuesdays. Bookings a good idea. Conditions apply.

promos.title: Takeaway Available
promos.body: The whole menu, packed up to take home. Give us a bell and we'll have it ready.

categories.name: Mains
categories.note: Steaks, parmas, fish & roast come with your choice of 2 sides — chips, salad, mash or steamed veg. Sauce & gravy +$2.50 (plain, mushroom, pepper or garlic butter).

menu.label: Parma Night
menu.intro: Parma Night — every Wednesday, 5pm–8pm. All parmas $25 and come with a free pot of Gordon draught. Served with your choice of 2 sides: chips, salads, veggies or mash.

menu.label: Cocktails
menu.intro: Signature cocktails — $12 each. Plus a full bar, tap beer and a drive-through bottle shop. Don't forget Happy Hour: $6 pots, Mon–Fri 4–6pm and Sat–Sun 3–5pm.
